campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to discuss staffing vacancies and recruitment efforts at City Hall, hear public comments on various matters, and inform residents about the upcoming Boogie Festival this weekend.
keyTopics: Open staffing positions and efforts to recruit and retain city employees
Public hearing on recruitment and retention strategies
Boogie Festival happening this weekend in Campbell

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — May 20, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council adopted a resolution to identify certain properties in Saratoga and scheduled a public hearing for June 17, 2026, where residents can voice concerns before the city makes a final decision on the matter.
keyTopics: Resolution adopted to identify specific properties in the city
Public hearing scheduled for June 17, 2026
Residents can submit protests and comments before final approval

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — June 2, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council held a meeting on June 2, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, confirm a youth commissioner, and set up an election for November 2026. The council also approved a new housing development map, authorized several contracts with vendors for town services, and dealt with budget matters.
keyTopics: November 3, 2026 general municipal election scheduled
New youth commissioner appointment ratified
Tract 10675 Boulevard development map approved
Multi-year contracts authorized with Accela, Inc. and other vendors for town services

san-jose.title: San José City Council — June 10, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a brief procedural meeting on June 10, 2026 to prepare for upcoming council sessions. They reviewed and organized agenda items for two upcoming meetings (June 16 and June 23), and discussed the Community and Economic Development Committee's work plan.
keyTopics: Organizing the June 16, 2026 council meeting agenda
Planning the June 23, 2026 council meeting agenda
Community and Economic Development Committee work plan review

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — June 9, 2026
mountain-view.summary: Mountain View's City Council met on June 9, 2026, to handle personnel matters in private and then celebrate two important observances in public. The council approved a new City Attorney and issued proclamations recognizing Pride Month and Juneteenth.
keyTopics: City Attorney appointment (discussed in closed session)
Pride Month proclamation
Juneteenth proclamation

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — June 16, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held two back-to-back special meetings on June 16, 2026. The first was a closed session (details not public), followed by a study session where council reviewed updates on the Community Equity Assessment.
keyTopics: Community Equity Assessment progress and updates
Closed session discussion

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — June 16, 2026
cupertino.summary: The City Council held a study session to review how parks and recreational facilities are currently zoned and designated in Cupertino, and to discuss what state laws require for protecting these spaces. The meeting also included an open comment period where residents could speak on any city matter not covered by the main agenda.
keyTopics: Review of existing zoning designations for parks and recreational facilities
Zoning corrections needed to comply with state law
State-level protections for parkland sites
Public comment period on non-agenda items

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — June 1, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara's City Council held a Stadium Neighborhood Relations Ad Hoc Subcommittee meeting to discuss community concerns related to the stadium. The city is accepting public comments both in-person and remotely via Zoom.
keyTopics: Stadium neighborhood impact and community relations
Public comment submission process (email by 10 a.m. day before meeting)
Remote participation options via Zoom or phone

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 7, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met to approve routine administrative items and discuss updates to the city's housing and community development plans for 2025-2026. The council also reviewed requests from individual members for new projects to work on and made changes to vacancy procedures.
keyTopics: Updates to the 2025-2030 Consolidated Plan for housing and community development
New workplan item requests from council members
Amendment to council vacancy procedures
Approval of meeting minutes and calendar

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — April 28, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to discuss updates from city departments and liaisons, review improvements planned for the Foothills Nature Preserve, and make decisions about how to run the middle school athletics program going forward. The council also confirmed the Parks and Recreation Commission's work plan for the next fiscal year.
keyTopics: Foothills Nature Preserve Improvements Project updates
Middle school athletics program management and future direction
Parks and Recreation Commission fiscal year 2027 work plan
Department reports and liaison updates
